keywords.job: I'm a nun, serving the gods of Tibia in this temple. I also heal wounded adventurers.
keywords.name: My name is Alia.
keywords.tibia: That's where we are. The world Tibia.
keywords.god: They created Tibia and all life on it.
keywords.excalibug: Sorry, I can't help you with that.
keywords.ghostlands: Uh, don't ask. Thats a place even the brave women of carlin don't dare to explore them!!!
keywords.heal$: You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the pilgrimage of ashes.
keywords.blessing: There are five different blessings available in five sacred places. These blessings are: the spiritual shielding, the spark of the phoenix, the embrace of tibia, the fire of the suns and the wisdom of solitude.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.spiritual: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You can receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.places: Just ask in which of the five blessings you are interested in.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin can provide you with the embrace of tibia.
keywords.fire: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.suns: Ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel .
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.time: Now, it is . Ask Gorn for a watch, if you need one.

texts: Welcome ! Welcome to the temple of Carlin.
I'm a nun, serving the gods of Tibia in this temple. I also heal wounded adventurers.

greetingPatterns.response: Welcome %N! Welcome to the temple of Carlin.
